name: unshittify
description: A collection of plugins that fix Claude Code annoyances.

plugins.name: local
plugins.description: Manage project-local Claude Code settings (.claude/settings.local.json) that /config and the settings UI don't expose per-project.

plugins.name: racket
plugins.description: Claude Code skills for working in Racket: classes, contracts, macros, concurrency, GUI, drawing, testing, packaging, and more.

plugins.name: global
plugins.description: Inspect and manage the user's global Claude Code settings (~/.claude/settings.json).

plugins.name: meta
plugins.description: Tooling for authoring Claude Code plugins — writing skills and agents.

plugins.name: communication
plugins.description: Review prose against this project's house style — BadProseExamples.org and CLAUDE.md's Communicate Clearly rules — before it reaches the user.

plugins.name: development
plugins.description: General software-development tooling not specific to any one language.

plugins.name: cxx
plugins.description: Claude Code skills for C++ development: compiling and running with sanitizers, and more.
